name: Telegram bot expense create
description: /ai one-expense parse, preview, explicit confirm, duplicate prevention, created_via_bot marker, and audit logging.

done: Migration 0003 adds telegram_bot_expense_drafts table + ALTER expenses ADD created_via_bot.
/ai <text> parses via parseExpensesWithAi, shows preview (amount/date/category/title/source/scope) with confirm/household/retry/cancel buttons.
Confirm creates ONE expense with created_via_bot=1 + audit log {source:'telegram_bot', expenseId}.
Idempotent confirm via dedupe_key (SHA256 of telegram_user_id + raw_text + occurredAt_date); draft expiry ~10 min.
Household selection two-step flow: empty payload lists member households; hhselect applies selection.
Membership verification on both household-select and confirm (defense-in-depth) blocks non-member household expense creation.
Default occurredAt uses today (new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10)) not 1st of month.
Oracle review approved after blocker fixes (B1 household selection, B2 membership verification, M4 occurredAt); security re-check confirmed fixes.
verification: ./init.sh test -> 89 tests pass after blocker fixes.
Oracle review ses_1104c50f3ffeg4DmSJG6CxWu1i found blockers; fixer resolved; security re-check ses_110461e4fffexrM7dynlhzNVlc verified B1+B2 fixed, no new issues, 112d cleared.

notes: Bot cannot edit or delete expenses. Missing required parse fields ask user to re-enter.
